sentences.text: then and now written by craig frederick focus question how have things changed over time
this is an old light bulb this is a new light bulb
this is an old camera this is a new camera
this is an old cell phone this is a new cell phone
this is an old television this is a new television
this is an old computer this is a new computer
this is an old car this is a new car
this is an old train this is a new train
this is an old plane this is a new plane

connections writing and art pick one old and one new item from the book draw a picture and write about one way they are alike and one way they are different social studies why is it important for things to change over time what would happen if nothing changed share your ideas with a partner
